description: Implement core LangExtract backend infrastructure including database schema, service layer, API endpoints, and feature flags

subtasks.description: Create database migration scripts for new tables (extraction_metadata, extraction_visualizations) and column extensions (scenes, scripts tables)
acceptance_criteria: extraction_metadata table created with proper indexes
scenes table extended with text_start, text_end, extraction_confidence, extraction_method columns
scripts table extended with extraction_method, langextract_version, has_visualization columns
Migration is idempotent and includes rollback script

subtasks.description: Apply database migrations to development environment and verify schema changes
subtasks.deliverable: Verified database schema in dev environment
acceptance_criteria: Tables and columns exist as specified

subtasks.description: Implement core LangExtract service (backend/services/langextract_service.py) with extraction, saving, and visualization generation functions
acceptance_criteria: Gemini API key configuration via environment variable
integration_points: Uses langextract_schema.py and langextract_examples.py from POC
Integrates with existing PDF text extraction
Saves to Supabase database via existing connection

subtasks.description: Implement feature flag system for LangExtract with environment variable ENABLE_LANGEXTRACT
subtasks.deliverable: Feature flag configuration and helper functions

subtasks.description: Create LangExtract API routes (backend/routes/langextract_routes.py) with extraction trigger, retrieval, and visualization endpoints
acceptance_criteria: Error responses with proper HTTP status codes

subtasks.description: Integrate LangExtract routes into main Flask/FastAPI application and register blueprints
subtasks.deliverable: LangExtract routes registered in main app

subtasks.description: Implement async job queue for long-running LangExtract extractions using Celery or background tasks
subtasks.deliverable: Async job queue with progress tracking
acceptance_criteria: LangExtract extraction runs in background job
Job status tracked in database (pending, processing, completed, failed)
Job results stored in extraction_metadata table
Job timeout and retry logic implemented
technical_notes: Consider using Celery with Redis or RQ for job queue
Alternative: FastAPI BackgroundTasks for simpler implementation
Store job_id in scripts table for tracking

subtasks.description: Write unit tests for LangExtract service functions (extraction, saving, visualization)
acceptance_criteria: Test extract_with_langextract() with mock Gemini API
Test error handling and edge cases
All tests pass in CI pipeline

subtasks.description: Write integration tests for LangExtract API endpoints
subtasks.deliverable: Integration test suite for API routes

subtasks.description: Create migration utility script to re-extract existing scripts with LangExtract (optional, for data migration)
technical_notes: Use async job queue for each script
Rate limit to avoid API quota issues
Skip scripts that already have LangExtract data

risk_factors.mitigation: Use virtual environment isolation, test in staging first

risk_factors.risk: Gemini API rate limits during testing
risk_factors.mitigation: Implement rate limiting, use test fixtures, mock API in unit tests
Test migrations in staging, create rollback scripts, backup before migration
Start with simple BackgroundTasks, upgrade to Celery if needed

success_metrics: Database schema deployed to dev environment
LangExtract service functional with test script
